title: Allogene Therapeutics Full Year 2024 Earnings: EPS Beats Expectations, Revenues Lag
text: Allogene Therapeutics Full Year 2024 Earnings Summary. Key Results: Narrower net loss of $257.6M (21% improvement from prior year). Loss per share improved to $1.32 vs $2.09 in 2023. EPS Performance: Exceeded analyst estimates by 3.0%. Revenue significantly underperformed, missing estimates by 36%. Pipeline Status: One program in Phase I, one in Phase II development. Forward Outlook: Revenue projected to grow 60% p.a. average during next 3 years, substantially outpacing biotech industry's 20% growth. Market Response: Stock declined 11% in past week following announcement. Risk Considerations: Five warning signs identified, two merit investor attention.
